---
title: "hBEC Inflammatory Response Analysis (MSD, LDH, TEER)"
author: "MJR"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
    theme: journal
knit: (function(input, ...) {
    rmarkdown::render(
      input,
      output_dir = "../output/reports",
      knit_root_dir = ".."
    )
  })
---

# Setup & Configuration

## Load Libraries & Functions

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
# Set root to project directory (one level up from analysis/)
knitr::opts_knit$set(root.dir = here::here())
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE)
```

```{r load-config}
# Source all configuration and function definitions
source("R/_load_all.R")

# Additional libraries specific to this analysis
library(arsenal)
library(rstatix)
library(lme4)
library(emmeans)
library(ARTool)
```

# Data Loading & Preparation

## Load Raw Data Files

```{r load-raw-data}
# Load cytokine data (LDH & TEER)
data_ldh_teer_raw <- read_csv(here::here(PATH_DATA_RAW, "2023_LDHTEER_MJR1-191_4H.csv"))

# Load MSD cytokine panel
data_msd_raw <- read_csv(here::here(PATH_DATA_RAW, "2023_FS_MSD_MJR_NEW.csv"))

# Load IL8 ELISA data
data_il8_raw <- read_csv(here::here(PATH_DATA_RAW, "20231006_IL8_MJR96_191_4H.csv"))

# Load metadata
metadata_samples <- read_csv(here::here(PATH_DATA_RAW, "2023_MJR1_191_metadata.csv"))

cat("✓ Raw data loaded\n")
```

## Clean & Prepare Data

```{r prepare-data}
# Convert LDH to numeric first
data_ldh_teer_raw$LDH <- as.numeric(data_ldh_teer_raw$LDH)

# Remove only rows where LDH is NA (not all NAs)
data_ldh_teer <- data_ldh_teer_raw %>%
  filter(!is.na(LDH))  # Only remove rows with missing LDH values

cat("✓ Data cleaned\n")
cat("  - Rows kept:", nrow(data_ldh_teer), "\n")
cat("  - LDH values:", sum(!is.na(data_ldh_teer$LDH)), "\n")

# Average duplicates
data_ldh_teer_avg <- data_ldh_teer %>%
  group_by(PATIENTCODE, CELLTYPE, EXPOSURE, TIMEPOINT, SEX, GROUP, CONCENTRATION) %>%
  summarise(
    LDH = mean(LDH, na.rm = TRUE),
    TEERPRE = mean(TEERPRE, na.rm = TRUE),
    TEERPOST = mean(TEERPOST, na.rm = TRUE),
    TEERCHANGE = mean(TEERCHANGE, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

cat("✓ Data averaged\n")
cat("  - Final rows:", nrow(data_ldh_teer_avg), "\n")

save_table(data_ldh_teer_avg, "ldh_teer_averaged.csv")
```


## Calculate LDH Cytotoxicity

```{r calculate-cytotoxicity}
# Calculate cytotoxicity percentage relative to positive control
data_ldh_cytotox <- data_ldh_teer_avg %>% 
  group_by(PATIENTCODE) %>% 
  mutate(
    Cytotox = (LDH - LDH[GROUP == "Control"]) / 
              (LDH[GROUP == "Positive Control"] - LDH[GROUP == "Control"]) * 100
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

cat("✓ Cytotoxicity calculated\n")
cat("  - Mean cytotoxicity (PBS):", 
    mean(data_ldh_cytotox$Cytotox[data_ldh_cytotox$EXPOSURE == "PBS Control"], na.rm = TRUE), "%\n")

# Test normality
shapiro_cytotox <- test_normality(data_ldh_cytotox$Cytotox)
if (!is.na(shapiro_cytotox$p.value)) {
  cat("  - Shapiro-Wilk p-value:", format(shapiro_cytotox$p.value, digits = 4), "\n")
}

# ============================================================================
# Create summary table with Sex breakdown (All, M, F)
# ============================================================================

# Get mean ± SD by EXPOSURE and SEX
summary_by_sex <- data_ldh_cytotox %>%
  filter(EXPOSURE != "10X Lysis Buffer", EXPOSURE != "Untreated Control") %>%
  group_by(EXPOSURE, SEX) %>%
  summarise(
    across(
      c(Cytotox, LDH, TEERPRE, TEERPOST, TEERCHANGE),
      list(mean = ~mean(.x, na.rm = TRUE), sd = ~sd(.x, na.rm = TRUE)),
      .names = "{.col}_{.fn}"
    ),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

# Get mean ± SD for All (combined sexes)
summary_all <- data_ldh_cytotox %>%
  filter(EXPOSURE != "10X Lysis Buffer", EXPOSURE != "Untreated Control") %>%
  group_by(EXPOSURE) %>%
  summarise(
    across(
      c(Cytotox, LDH, TEERPRE, TEERPOST, TEERCHANGE),
      list(mean = ~mean(.x, na.rm = TRUE), sd = ~sd(.x, na.rm = TRUE)),
      .names = "{.col}_{.fn}"
    ),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(SEX = "All")

# Combine both
ldh_teer_summary_long <- bind_rows(summary_by_sex, summary_all)

# Pivot longer and format as "mean ± sd"
ldh_teer_summary <- ldh_teer_summary_long %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = -c(EXPOSURE, SEX),
    names_to = c("Measurement", "Stat"),
    names_sep = "_"
  ) %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = Stat,
    values_from = value
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    Value = sprintf("%.1f ± %.1f", mean, sd),
    Measurement = paste0(Measurement, "_", SEX)
  ) %>%
  select(EXPOSURE, Measurement, Value) %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = EXPOSURE,
    values_from = Value
  )

# Save summary
save_table(ldh_teer_summary, "LDH_TEER_summary.csv")

cat("✓ LDH/TEER summary table saved\n")
cat("  - Measurements:", nrow(ldh_teer_summary), "\n")
cat("  - Groups (All, M, F) × Measures (Cytotox, LDH, TEER...)\n")

# Show preview
cat("\nPreview:\n")
print(head(ldh_teer_summary, 10))
```

## Prepare MSD Data with LLOD Imputation

```{r prepare-msd}
# Merge metadata with MSD data
data_msd_with_meta <- data_msd_raw %>%
  left_join(metadata_samples, by = "SAMPLEID")

# Impute values below LLOD
imputation_result <- impute_lod(
  input_data = data_msd_with_meta,
  cols = NULL,
  cytokine_llod = cytokine_llod,
  zero_cutoff = ZERO_CUTOFF
)

data_msd_imputed <- imputation_result$data
valid_cytokines <- imputation_result$valid_cytokines

cat("✓ MSD data imputation complete\n")
cat("  - Valid cytokines:", length(valid_cytokines), "\n")

save_table(data_msd_imputed, "msd_cleaned.csv")
```

## Replace MSD IL-8 with ELISA IL-8 Data

```{r il8-replacement}
# Remove blank values from IL-8 data
data_il8_clean <- data_il8_raw
data_il8_clean[data_il8_clean == ""] <- NA
data_il8_clean <- na.omit(data_il8_clean)

# Average replicates for the same PATIENT and EXPOSURE
data_il8_avg <- data_il8_clean %>%
  group_by(PATIENTCODE, CELLTYPE, EXPOSURE, TIMEPOINT, SEX, GROUP, CONCENTRATION) %>%
  summarize(
    IL8 = mean(IL8, na.rm = TRUE),
    SAMPLEID = {
      # Extract numeric part from SAMPLE_ID
      nums <- as.numeric(sub(".*_(\\d+)$", "\\1", SAMPLEID))
      # Keep only even numbers
      even_nums <- nums[nums %% 2 == 0]
      # Pick the highest even number (or NA if none)
      if(length(even_nums) > 0) {
        SAMPLEID[which(nums == max(even_nums))[1]]
      } else {
        NA_character_
      }
    },
    .groups = "drop"
  )

# Calculate fold change relative to PBS Control (if GROUP exists)
if ("GROUP" %in% colnames(data_il8_avg)) {
  data_il8_avg <- data_il8_avg %>%
    group_by(PATIENTCODE) %>%
    mutate(IL8_PBS = (IL8 - IL8[GROUP == "Control"]) / IL8[GROUP == "Control"]) %>%
    ungroup()
}

# Remove IL8 from msd_imputed and add ELISA IL8
il8_subset <- data_il8_avg %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  select(SAMPLEID, IL8)

data_msd_imputed <- data_msd_imputed %>%
  select(-IL8) %>%
  left_join(il8_subset, by = "SAMPLEID")

cat("✓ IL-8 ELISA data merged\n")
cat("  - Rows with IL-8 data:", sum(!is.na(data_msd_imputed$IL8)), "\n")

save_table(data_il8_avg, "il8_elisa_averaged.csv")
```

# Exploratory Analysis

## Outlier Detection

```{r detect-outliers}
cat("Detecting outliers in PBS control samples...\n\n")

# Select PBS control samples
pbs_data <- data_msd_imputed %>%
  filter(EXPOSURE == "PBS_Control") %>%
  select(all_of(valid_cytokines[1:5]))

outlier_results <- detect_outliers_grubbs(pbs_data)
print(outlier_results)
```

## Normality Testing

```{r test-normality}
cat("Testing normality of key measurements...\n\n")

# Test LDH
shapiro_ldh <- test_normality(data_ldh_teer_avg$LDH)
if (!is.na(shapiro_ldh$p.value)) {
  cat("LDH - Shapiro-Wilk p-value:", format(shapiro_ldh$p.value, digits = 4), "\n")
} else {
  cat("LDH - Sample size too small for normality test\n")
}

# Test TEER change
shapiro_teer <- test_normality(data_ldh_teer_avg$TEERCHANGE)
if (!is.na(shapiro_teer$p.value)) {
  cat("TEER Change - Shapiro-Wilk p-value:", format(shapiro_teer$p.value, digits = 4), "\n")
} else {
  cat("TEER Change - Sample size too small for normality test\n")
}
```

# Statistical Testing

## Prepare Data for Tests

```{r prepare-for-stats}
data_for_stats <- data_msd_imputed %>%
  filter(EXPOSURE != "Untreated Control") %>%
  mutate(
    EXPOSURE = factor(EXPOSURE),
    SEX = factor(SEX),
    PATIENTCODE = factor(PATIENTCODE)
  ) %>%
  select(PATIENTCODE, SEX, EXPOSURE, all_of(valid_cytokines))

cat("✓ Data prepared for statistical testing\n")
```

## Non-parametric Tests

```{r nonparam-tests}
cat("Running Nonparametric Tests by Group\n\n")

# ===============================================================
# 1. Run nonparametric pairwise tests for all groups
# ===============================================================
nonparametric_results_All <- nonparametric_pairwise(
  data = data_for_stats,
  group = "All",
  adjust_method = "BH",
  response_columns = valid_cytokines
)

nonparametric_results_F <- nonparametric_pairwise(
  data = data_for_stats,
  group = "F",
  adjust_method = "BH",
  response_columns = valid_cytokines
)

nonparametric_results_M <- nonparametric_pairwise(
  data = data_for_stats,
  group = "M",
  adjust_method = "BH",
  response_columns = valid_cytokines
)

# ===============================================================
# 2. Run nonparametric tests for LDH / TEER measurements
# ===============================================================
LDH_TEER_results <- nonparametric_pairwise(
  data = data_ldh_teer_avg,
  group = "All",
  response_columns = c("LDH", "TEERCHANGE")
)

cat("✓ Nonparametric tests complete\n")
print(head(nonparametric_results_All, 10))
```

## Format Nonparametric Test Results

```{r nonparametric-format-output}
cat("Formatting Nonparametric Test Results\n\n")

# Combine all nonparametric results
nonparametric_all <- bind_rows(
  nonparametric_results_All %>% mutate(group = "All"),
  nonparametric_results_F %>% mutate(group = "F"),
  nonparametric_results_M %>% mutate(group = "M")
)

# Write nonparametric results
save_table(nonparametric_all, "nonparametric_cytokine_results.csv")
save_table(LDH_TEER_results, "nonparametric_LDH_TEER_results.csv")

cat("Nonparametric results saved.\n")
print(head(nonparametric_all, 10))
```

## LMER with Treatment-vs-Control Contrasts

```{r lmer-contrasts}
cat("LMER Analysis with Treatment-vs-Control Contrasts (BH-FDR corrected)\n\n")

# Run LMER contrasts
lmer_significance <- exposure_lmer_pairwise(
  data = data_for_stats, group = "All", adjust_method = "fdr",
  response_columns = valid_cytokines, ctrl_level = "PBS Control"
)

lmer_F_significance <- exposure_lmer_pairwise(
  data_for_stats, group = "F", adjust_method = "fdr",
  response_columns = valid_cytokines, ctrl_level = "PBS Control"
)

lmer_M_significance <- exposure_lmer_pairwise(
  data_for_stats, group = "M", adjust_method = "fdr",
  response_columns = valid_cytokines, ctrl_level = "PBS Control"
)

# Combine results
lmer_results_all <- bind_rows(lmer_significance, lmer_F_significance, lmer_M_significance)

# Show significant results
lmer_sig <- lmer_results_all %>%
  filter(p.value < 0.05) %>%
  arrange(p.value)

print(head(lmer_sig, 20))
save_table(lmer_results_all, "lmer_contrasts_all.csv")
save_table(lmer_sig, "lmer_contrasts_significant.csv")
```

## Format LMER Results with Significance Stars and LLOD Check

```{r lmer-format-output}
cat("Formatting LMER Results with Significance Stars and LLOD Check\n\n")

# Generate significance stars based on p-value
stars_df_lmer <- lmer_results_all %>%
  mutate(stars = case_when(
    p.value < 0.001 & estimate > 0  ~ "***",
    p.value < 0.001 & estimate < 0  ~ "###",
    p.value < 0.01  & estimate > 0  ~ "**",
    p.value < 0.01  & estimate < 0  ~ "##",
    p.value < 0.05  & estimate > 0  ~ "*",
    p.value < 0.05  & estimate < 0  ~ "#",
    p.value < 0.1   & estimate != 0 ~ "~",
    TRUE ~ ""
  ))

# Pivot stars to long format
stars_long_lmer <- stars_df_lmer %>%
  select(response, group, contrast, stars) %>%
  mutate(
    Measurement = response,
    EXPOSURE = str_trim(gsub(" - PBS Control$", "", contrast))
  ) %>%
  select(Measurement, group, EXPOSURE, stars)

# Get mean ± SD summary by exposure AND group
msd_summary_by_group <- data_for_stats %>%
  group_by(EXPOSURE, SEX) %>%
  summarise(across(all_of(valid_cytokines),
                   list(mean = ~mean(.x, na.rm = TRUE),
                        sd = ~sd(.x, na.rm = TRUE)),
                   .names = "{.col}_{.fn}"),
            .groups = "drop") %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = -c(EXPOSURE, SEX),
               names_to = c("Measurement", "Stat"),
               names_sep = "_",
               values_to = "Value") %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = Stat,
              values_from = Value) %>%
  mutate(Value_full = sprintf("%.2f ± %.2f", mean, sd),
         group = SEX) %>%
  select(Measurement, group, EXPOSURE, Value_full)

# Also get "All" combined results
msd_summary_all <- data_for_stats %>%
  group_by(EXPOSURE) %>%
  summarise(across(all_of(valid_cytokines),
                   list(mean = ~mean(.x, na.rm = TRUE),
                        sd = ~sd(.x, na.rm = TRUE)),
                   .names = "{.col}_{.fn}"),
            .groups = "drop") %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = -EXPOSURE,
               names_to = c("Measurement", "Stat"),
               names_sep = "_",
               values_to = "Value") %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = Stat,
              values_from = Value) %>%
  mutate(Value_full = sprintf("%.2f ± %.2f", mean, sd),
         group = "All") %>%
  select(Measurement, group, EXPOSURE, Value_full)

# Combine all groups
msd_summary_wide <- bind_rows(msd_summary_by_group, msd_summary_all)

# Merge stars and apply LLOD check
combined_long_lmer <- msd_summary_wide %>%
  left_join(stars_long_lmer, by = c("Measurement", "group", "EXPOSURE")) %>%
  mutate(Analyte_Base = gsub("_.*", "", Measurement)) %>%
  left_join(cytokine_llod, by = c("Analyte_Base" = "Analyte")) %>%
  mutate(
    Value_num = as.numeric(sub("^(\\d*\\.?\\d+).*", "\\1", Value_full)),
    Value_final = ifelse(
      !is.na(stars) & !is.na(Value_num) & Value_num >= LLOD,
      paste0(Value_full, " ", stars),
      Value_full
    )
  )

# Pivot to wide format with group column
combined_wide_lmer <- combined_long_lmer %>%
  select(Measurement, group, EXPOSURE, Value_final) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = EXPOSURE, values_from = Value_final) %>%
  select(group, Measurement, `PBS Control`, everything())

# Write single output CSV
save_table(combined_wide_lmer, "MSD_hbec_lmer_with_significance.csv")

cat("Output saved to: output/tables/MSD_hbec_lmer_with_significance.csv\n")
print(head(combined_wide_lmer, 10))
```

## ART ANOVA with Treatment-vs-Control Contrasts

```{r art-contrasts}
cat("ART ANOVA (Sensitivity Analysis) with Treatment-vs-Control Contrasts\n\n")

# Run ART ANOVA contrasts
hbec_significance_art <- exposure_art_pairwise(
  data_for_stats, group = "All", adjust_method = "fdr",
  response_columns = valid_cytokines, ctrl_level = "PBS Control"
)

msd_F_significance_art <- exposure_art_pairwise(
  data_for_stats, group = "F", adjust_method = "fdr",
  response_columns = valid_cytokines, ctrl_level = "PBS Control"
)

msd_M_significance_art <- exposure_art_pairwise(
  data_for_stats, group = "M", adjust_method = "fdr",
  response_columns = valid_cytokines, ctrl_level = "PBS Control"
)

# Combine results
art_results_all <- bind_rows(hbec_significance_art, msd_F_significance_art, msd_M_significance_art)

# Show significant results
art_sig <- art_results_all %>%
  filter(p.value < 0.05) %>%
  arrange(p.value)

print(head(art_sig, 20))
save_table(art_results_all, "art_contrasts_all.csv")
save_table(art_sig, "art_contrasts_significant.csv")
```

## Format ART Results with Significance Stars and LLOD Check

```{r art-format-output}
cat("Formatting ART Results with Significance Stars and LLOD Check\n\n")

# Generate significance stars based on p-value
stars_df_art <- art_results_all %>%
  mutate(stars = case_when(
    p.value < 0.001 & estimate > 0  ~ "***",
    p.value < 0.001 & estimate < 0  ~ "###",
    p.value < 0.01  & estimate > 0  ~ "**",
    p.value < 0.01  & estimate < 0  ~ "##",
    p.value < 0.05  & estimate > 0  ~ "*",
    p.value < 0.05  & estimate < 0  ~ "#",
    p.value < 0.1   & estimate != 0 ~ "~",
    TRUE ~ ""
  ))

# Pivot stars to long format
stars_long_art <- stars_df_art %>%
  select(response, group, contrast, stars) %>%
  mutate(
    Measurement = response,
    EXPOSURE = str_trim(gsub(" - PBS Control$", "", contrast))
  ) %>%
  select(Measurement, group, EXPOSURE, stars)

# Get mean ± SD summary by exposure AND group
msd_summary_by_group_art <- data_for_stats %>%
  group_by(EXPOSURE, SEX) %>%
  summarise(across(all_of(valid_cytokines),
                   list(mean = ~mean(.x, na.rm = TRUE),
                        sd = ~sd(.x, na.rm = TRUE)),
                   .names = "{.col}_{.fn}"),
            .groups = "drop") %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = -c(EXPOSURE, SEX),
               names_to = c("Measurement", "Stat"),
               names_sep = "_",
               values_to = "Value") %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = Stat,
              values_from = Value) %>%
  mutate(Value_full = sprintf("%.2f ± %.2f", mean, sd),
         group = SEX) %>%
  select(Measurement, group, EXPOSURE, Value_full)

# Also get "All" combined results
msd_summary_all_art <- data_for_stats %>%
  group_by(EXPOSURE) %>%
  summarise(across(all_of(valid_cytokines),
                   list(mean = ~mean(.x, na.rm = TRUE),
                        sd = ~sd(.x, na.rm = TRUE)),
                   .names = "{.col}_{.fn}"),
            .groups = "drop") %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = -EXPOSURE,
               names_to = c("Measurement", "Stat"),
               names_sep = "_",
               values_to = "Value") %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = Stat,
              values_from = Value) %>%
  mutate(Value_full = sprintf("%.2f ± %.2f", mean, sd),
         group = "All") %>%
  select(Measurement, group, EXPOSURE, Value_full)

# Combine all groups
msd_summary_wide_art <- bind_rows(msd_summary_by_group_art, msd_summary_all_art)

# Merge stars and apply LLOD check
combined_long_art <- msd_summary_wide_art %>%
  left_join(stars_long_art, by = c("Measurement", "group", "EXPOSURE")) %>%
  mutate(Analyte_Base = gsub("_.*", "", Measurement)) %>%
  left_join(cytokine_llod, by = c("Analyte_Base" = "Analyte")) %>%
  mutate(
    Value_num = as.numeric(sub("^(\\d*\\.?\\d+).*", "\\1", Value_full)),
    Value_final = ifelse(
      !is.na(stars) & !is.na(Value_num) & Value_num >= LLOD,
      paste0(Value_full, " ", stars),
      Value_full
    )
  )

# Pivot to wide format with group column
combined_wide_art <- combined_long_art %>%
  select(Measurement, group, EXPOSURE, Value_final) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = EXPOSURE, values_from = Value_final) %>%
  select(group, Measurement, `PBS Control`, everything())

# Write single output CSV
save_table(combined_wide_art, "MSD_hbec_art_with_significance.csv")

cat("Output saved to: output/tables/MSD_hbec_art_with_significance.csv\n")
print(head(combined_wide_art, 10))
```

## Normality Testing: Transformation Assessment

```{r transform-normality}
cat("Testing normality of original, log10, and sqrt transformed data\n\n")

# Test transformations for a few key cytokines
transform_results <- data.frame()

for (cyt in valid_cytokines[1:5]) {
  result <- test_transformations(data_for_stats[[cyt]])
  result$Cytokine <- cyt
  transform_results <- rbind(transform_results, result)
}

print(transform_results)
save_table(transform_results, "normality_transformation_assessment.csv")
```

# Summary & Outputs

```{r session-summary}
cat("\n")
cat("═══════════���═════════════════════════════════════════════════\n")
cat("  INFLAMMATORY ANALYSIS COMPLETE\n")
cat("═════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n\n")

cat("Output files saved to:\n")
cat("  Figures:", file.path(getwd(), PATH_OUTPUT_FIGURES), "\n")
cat("  Tables:", file.path(getwd(), PATH_OUTPUT_TABLES), "\n\n")

sessionInfo()
```
